free_text: cross sections for 14.1-MeV neutrons on zirconium and
the calibration of a crystal scintillation spectrometer
Main sources of error are uncertainty in
neutron flux and statistical error. The tabulated
errors are the estimated upper-limit standard
ERR-ANALYS, updated STATUS, corrected REACTION in
SUM OF GROUND AND METASTABLE STATES.
Sum of ground and metastable states
